title: Data centers cause electricity price increases, pollution and a moratorium in New York
summary: The growth of data centers raises electricity bills by 23 billion, generates polluting emissions in Mississippi and leads New York to ban new projects for a year.

title: Chinese manufacturer CXMT advances in DRAM memory manufacturing and gets support from MSI
summary: CXMT will match Micron's capacity this year while MSI promotes compatibility of its motherboards with CXMT's DDR5 memory.

title: Intel invests 5.7 billion in its Ireland factory and moves Nova Lake production to its own facilities
summary: Intel strengthens its manufacturing in Europe with a million-dollar investment in Ireland and announces that Nova Lake processors will be produced internally to improve yields.

title: Microsoft launches the largest security update in its history with over 600 vulnerabilities fixed
summary: The company releases patches for hundreds of flaws, including two zero-day vulnerabilities actively exploited.

title: OpenAI prepares a screenless smart speaker with movement capabilities, according to Bloomberg
summary: OpenAI's first hardware device would be a speaker that can move and seeks to change interaction with artificial intelligence.

title: DeepSeek negotiates a $1.5 billion round and plans its IPO
summary: The Chinese AI startup seeks new capital weeks after closing a $7 billion round, preparing an IPO.

title: DeepMind CEO calls for independent regulatory body for artificial intelligence
summary: Demis Hassabis advocates for establishing safety barriers and a global regulatory body for frontier AI, acknowledging uncertainty about the future of the technology.

title: HWMonitor restores hotspot temperature monitoring on NVIDIA RTX 50 GPUs
summary: After a guide on how to measure hotspot temperature, the HWMonitor update officially recovers this feature for RTX 50.

title: Samsung updates its 990 2TB SSD and warns about 870 EVO counterfeits
summary: The revision of the Samsung 990 2TB shows speed and efficiency improvements, while a fake 870 EVO unit fails after writing only 120GB.

title: Valve fixes overheating warning in Steam Machine and tests reveal limited performance
summary: A BIOS update raises the temperature threshold, but tests of 25 games show that the Steam Machine is still not recommendable.

title: Google integrates AI-generated images in search and redesigns Google Images in Pinterest style
summary: Google allows generating images with AI when it doesn't find results and renews the Google Images interface to improve visual discovery.

title: ChatGPT returns to WhatsApp in Europe and a study analyzes why users share secrets with the bot
summary: The European Union forces Meta to allow rival bots on WhatsApp, facilitating the return of ChatGPT, while an investigation reveals the psychological reasons behind users' trust.

title: Anthropic claims to have found 'consciousness' in Claude and discovers behavioral differences depending on language
summary: Anthropic claims to have identified signs of consciousness in its AI Claude, although the data is disputed, and the model responds more warmly in Hindi and more rigorously in Russian.

title: Nintendo could launch Switch 2 with 1080p OLED screen and there is already a retro dock with N64 style
summary: Rumors point to a higher resolution screen for the next console, while a third-party accessory offers a dock with a Nintendo 64 look that houses six games.

title: Apple opens public beta of its new Siri with artificial intelligence in iOS 27
summary: All users can try the new Siri assistant with advanced AI through the public beta of iOS 27.

title: Major publishers sue Google for using their content to train AI
summary: Google faces another copyright infringement lawsuit from major publishers alleging unauthorized use of their works to train AI models.

title: Volkswagen delays construction of its battery factory in Sagunto
summary: The German manufacturer postpones plans to manufacture batteries in Spain, delaying its low-cost electric car projects.

title: Lucid Motors denies it is considering filing for bankruptcy
summary: The electric vehicle company denies reports claiming it considered filing for bankruptcy.

title: Reflection closes a $1 billion cloud computing agreement with Nebius
summary: AI startup Reflection signs a massive contract to use Nebius infrastructure for training its models.

title: PixVerse achieves a valuation of $2 billion in the AI-generated video sector
summary: The artificial intelligence video generation company PixVerse demonstrates that investors still trust the potential of the sector.
